top_signals.title: Stocks Climb as Buyers Snap Up Bargains; Oil Rises: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Bargain hunters are pushing stocks higher at the start of a week in which leaders of the biggest central banks and a busy data calendar will set the tone. Oil rose after a weekend of tensions in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BIS warns stablecoins are more like ETFs than actual money, and they're creating FX risk
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks slip as US and Iran renew talks; Burnham unveils plans for government
top_signals.summary: Good morning from the City AM liveblog team. Stock markets wobbled on Monday as the US and Iran Iran ​agreed to halt recent hostilities in the Gulf and renew talks over their dispute over the Strait of Hormuz. Talks are expected to resume on Tuesday, officials said, but any halt on hostilities is regarded as [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
top_signals.summary: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.
